zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes FitzPincheon heiress of Eresby於1143年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾利斯比時，她的父親Hugh FitzPincheon43歲，母親FitzPincheon19歲。她和Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby至少有1個兒子。她去世於1167年在英國越可爾享年24歲。

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes FitzPincheon heiress of Eresby was born in 1143, in Risby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Hugh FitzPincheon, was 43 and her mother, FitzPincheon, was 19. She had at least 1 son with Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby. She died in 1167, in Yorkshire, England, at the age of 24.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes FitzPincheon heiress of Eresby est née en 1143, à Risby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh FitzPincheon, avait 43 ans et sa mère, FitzPincheon, avait 19 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby. Elle est décédée en 1167, à Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 24 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes FitzPincheon heiress of Eresby 1143 in Risby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh FitzPincheon 43 und ihre Mutter FitzPincheon 19. ja.lifeSummary: Agnes FitzPincheon heiress of Eresbyが1143年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアリスビーで生まれた時，父Hugh FitzPincheonは43歳，母FitzPincheonは19歳であった。彼女はWalter de Beke Lord of Eresbyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1167年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで24歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes FitzPincheon heiress of Eresby(이)가 1143년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 리스비에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh FitzPincheon(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 FitzPincheon(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1167년 영국 요르크실르에서 24세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes FitzPincheon heiress of Eresby родилась в 1143 г. в местности рисби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hugh FitzPincheon было 43 года, а матери, которую звали FitzPincheon, 19. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Walter de Beke Lord of Eresby. Она умерла в 1167 г. в местности еркшир, Англия в возрасте 24 лет.
